title: Continue extracting a cross-platform file indexer

events.text: Extract file indexing behind one interface; keep Windows, macOS, and Linux behavior and never load every file into memory.
Directory traversal and streamed hashing moved into src/indexer/local-indexer.ts.
The first recursive implementation follows a fixture symlink forever.
Resolving every path through realpath was tried and reverted because it changed reported paths on Windows junctions.
Tracking visited directory identities stops the loop and keeps presented paths; unit tests pass.
The remaining work is .ignore-file support. Keep ignore parsing inside the local indexer.

criticalConstraints.text: Preserve Windows, macOS, and Linux behavior.
Do not load all file contents into memory.

objectiveAndState.text: Extract local indexing behind one interface; traversal, hashing, and cycle handling are done, ignore parsing is not.

decisionsAndFailedAttempts.text: Rewriting every presented path through realpath was rejected because it changed Windows junction paths.
Use visited directory identity only for cycle detection.

completedAndPending.text: Streaming traversal and symlink-cycle handling pass; ignore-file support remains pending.

workspaceEvidence.text: The local indexer and symlink regression are new; the index interface is modified.

nextAction.text: Implement and test ignore-file parsing inside local-indexer.ts.
